name: Mike's Lasagne
recipeIngredient: 1 pound sweet Italian sausage (450g), finely sliced
1 pound mozzarella cheese, thinly sliced by machine (approx. 450g)
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare two large frying pans and coat with non-stick PAM or a similar spray.
- Place the ground beef in one pan and the Italian sausage in the other.
2. As the meat begins to brown, add half of the chopped onion and garlic to each pan.
- Sauté until the meat is brown and crumbly in both pans.
3. Combine all the meat into a single large frying pan, Dutch oven, or similar pot.
- Add tomato sauce, tomato paste, red wine, water, oregano, black pepper (if desired), and a pinch of salt if you prefer.
- Stir well and cover the pan. Cook for several hours until everything is fully integrated.
4. Prepare the lasagna noodles according to package instructions. Once cooked, rinse them briefly with cold water to cool them down.
5. Preheat an oven to 350°F (175°C).
6. In a casserole dish or deep baking pan (about 2-3 inches wide), alternate layers of noodles, sauce, ricotta cheese, and mozzarella until all ingredients are used up.
7. Sprinkle the shredded parmesan cheese evenly over the top layer.
8. Bake in the preheated oven for approximately 60 minutes, or until the lasagne is heated through and the cheese is golden.
This comforting dish freezes well and pairs perfectly with hot sourdough garlic french bread and a tossed green salad on chilly winter nights when you crave warmth without the hassle of cooking.
